metadata.sysdescription: Jotar is a Torgoth-controlled system run in what even torgoths view as a distopian way: mine bosses, enforcers, and debt-bound labour all feeding a steady output of ore, crude industrial stock, and fuel. The Torgoth here value utility and dominance; negotiations are direct and often backed by demonstrations of strength. For outsiders, Jotar is profitable and dangerous in equal measure—an excellent place to buy bulk goods if you can survive the terms.
